FeatureName: Trip-wide selection and optional quota reuse
Description: Build the final trip-wide selection locally from saved day manifests, treating daily and total photo limits as ceilings rather than fill targets.

Stories.StoryDescription: Build a trip-level merge step that consumes saved day_selection_manifest files and compares photos using saved ranks, scores, tags, and good-enough signals only.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Trip-wide selection can be computed locally from saved per-day manifests without resending images.

Stories.StoryName: Apply day and trip caps as ceilings
Stories.StoryDescription: Apply max photos per day and max photos total as upper bounds only, never as quotas that must be filled.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The trip-wide selection logic respects configured caps without forcing the album to fill all available slots.

Stories.StoryDescription: Stop selecting additional photos when remaining candidates are no longer marked good enough, even if day or trip caps are not reached.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The final selection can end early when no sufficiently good photos remain.

Stories.StoryName: Allow optional reuse of spare capacity
Stories.StoryDescription: Allow unused day capacity to be reused only when other days still have strong remaining candidates, without forcing such reuse.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Unused quota may remain unused, but strong spillover photos can still be selected when appropriate.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add tests for quiet days, empty days, partial albums, optional spillover, and deterministic tie-break behavior.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover trip-wide merge, early stop behavior, and optional quota reuse.
